description: Case style: Analog watch with a square stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Silver dial with black hands Strap style: Stainless steel butterfly clasp with a press lock clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 6 and 9 hour mark and date aperture on the 12 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
